title: Google Associate Product Manager H-1B LCA Data 2024 | h1bdata.info
note: 21 LCA records for Google Associate Product Manager (2024). Salary range $130K–$145K, median $139K; Mountain View (15 records) median $136K, NYC and SF each at $137.5K–$139K. Wages reflect base salary per DOL LCA filings.
